# Journey

Welcome to my personal journey. Here are the important milestones in my life — from career growth to bold life decisions.

2026
Aug 2025 →

🔬 Undergraduate Researcher at Biological Data Science Lab

Working as a TÜBİTAK Undergraduate Researcher under Prof. Dr. Tunca Doğan at Hacettepe University. Adapting state-of-the-art LLMs to protein generation.

↗ HuBio Data Lab
Jul 2025

💼 AI Engineering Intern at nanominds

Researched AI workflows in Venture Capital and analyzed AI use cases across the investment process.

Mar 2025

✏️ Part-Time Art Instructor at AYBU

Taught students the fundamentals of pencil drawing — perspective to anatomical sketches.

2025
Sep 2024

🚀 AI Team Lead at BİLTEK AI & Zenith AI

Founded Zenith AI competition team and led the TEKNOFEST 2025 AI in Aviation challenge — built YOLO + ORB visual odometry for flying cars.

2024
Oct 2023

💻 Computer Engineering at AYBU

Transferred to Computer Engineering at Ankara Yıldırım Beyazıt University, fulfilling a childhood dream.

2023
Sep 2021

🦷 Dropped Out of Dentistry to Pursue Engineering

Made the radical decision to leave dentistry after two years to follow my true passion in engineering and technology.
